---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.11.5)
- **Node version:** (e.g., 18.17.0)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120)
- **NetScope version/commit:** (e.g., v1.0.1 or commit hash)

## Device Context (if applicable)

- **Platform:** (e.g., IOS-XE 17.09, NX-OS 10.3)
- **Device model:** (e.g., Catalyst 9300)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (screenshots, config snippets with credentials redacted).
